title: dryopteris lichiangensis
intro: Dryopteris lichiangensis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the Lichiangensis fern. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves of Dryopteris lichiangensis contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried and made into teas or infusions, or used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal tonics.
